data.title: SSL Encryption
data.description: Secures data in transit with SSL/TLS encryption.
data.technical_spec: Implements HTTPS with a valid certificate authority.

data.title: Firewall Protection
data.description: Prevents unauthorized access and malicious traffic.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes web application firewalls (WAF) and network-level firewalls.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employs traffic filtering and load balancing strategies.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security via two-step verification.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with authentication services like Auth0 or Google Authenticator.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Regularly checks for security flaws in the system.
data.technical_spec: Runs automated scans using tools like Nessus or Qualys.
